title: Cigarette torches
description: Turns regular torches into cigarettes, nothing else to say. Don't smoke kids!!!
body:
Turns all regular torches into Cigarette torches, nothing else to say. The filter and the burnt end are both visable with the burnt end actually burning. This is a purely fun pack and not for utility. Don't smoke kids!!!

If there is a version that does not exist please email me here so i know to add it:
zwhseton@gmail.com
